title: Retirement Everest Film Features HK Solutions on Decumulation Risks
summary: Retirement Everest film examines the challenges of managing finances after retirement, featuring Keith Helmendach of HK Solutions.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of financial planning beyond just saving for retirement, addressing the decumulation phase.

title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead, Several Wounded
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries, according to the NC State Bureau of Investigation.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and gun violence in community spaces, prompting investigations and community response.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte as a hub for polymer technology and provides training opportunities for industry professionals.

title: Search Underway for Missing Teenager in Statesville Area
summary: Police are searching for a missing teenager last seen on May 12 in the Statesville area. Details are limited.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the vulnerability of youth and the importance of community vigilance in locating missing persons.

title: Deadly Double Shooting in East Charlotte Claims One Life
summary: A double shooting on Weldon Avenue in east Charlotte resulted in one death and one injury. Police are investigating the incident.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about rising crime rates and public safety in certain areas of Charlotte.

title: Mandatory Water Restrictions Implemented for Charlotte Water Customers
summary: Due to severe drought conditions, Charlotte Water has implemented mandatory water restrictions starting May 15, limiting usage.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the urgent need for water conservation and the impact of drought on daily life and local resources.

title: Former Mayoral Candidate Offers to Serve as Interim Mayor
summary: Brendan Maginnis, a former Democratic candidate, has offered to serve as interim mayor following Vi Lyles' resignation.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates civic engagement and potential leadership transition in Charlotte's political landscape.

title: Heat Wave Expected to Build Up This Weekend
summary: The Charlotte area is expected to experience hot and humid weather, with temperatures rising throughout the weekend and into next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast and reminds residents to take precautions during periods of high heat and humidity.

title: I-77 Toll Debate Intensifies Ahead of Key Vote
summary: Debate over the I-77 toll project intensifies before a crucial vote by the Charlotte Regional Transportation Planning Organization.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing controversy surrounding infrastructure projects and their impact on transportation and local communities.

title: Charlotte Business Owner Jamil Whitlow Battles Rare Kidney Disease
summary: Jamil Whitlow, a Charlotte business owner, is raising awareness about his battle with a rare kidney disease while awaiting a transplant.
charlotte_impact: Showcases resilience and community support while highlighting the challenges of managing chronic illness and healthcare costs.

title: Davidson Main Street Construction Disrupts Traffic, Hurts Businesses
summary: Construction on Main Street in Davidson is causing traffic congestion and negatively impacting small businesses in the area.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the short-term challenges associated with long-term infrastructure improvements in local business districts.

title: South Carolina Lawmakers Called Back for Special Session
summary: Gov. McMaster calls South Carolina lawmakers back for a special session to redraw congressional districts and address other issues.
charlotte_impact: Reports on political developments in South Carolina, including redistricting efforts ahead of midterm elections.

title: Exceptional CMS Students Enjoy VIP Treatment at Special Prom
summary: CMS students with special needs were treated to a fully immersive, red-carpet prom celebration, removing all barriers.
charlotte_impact: Celebrates inclusivity and provides a memorable experience for students with disabilities, fostering a sense of belonging.

title: Charlotte Outpaces Major Cities in Population Growth
summary: New data reveals Charlotte is now the 14th largest city in the U.S. due to significant population growth.
charlotte_impact: Highlights Charlotte's increasing prominence and economic opportunities, attracting new residents and investment.

title: Gas Line Explosion in Matthews Highlights Utility Dangers
summary: A gas line explosion in Matthews underscores the hidden dangers for utility crews, with high rates of excavation-related utility strikes.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about safety protocols and the need for improved coordination to prevent utility accidents.
